questions.question: Obstetrics and Gynecology I (Q001): A clinical concept related to prenatal screening is assessed. Which option is MOST accurate?
questions.option_a: Finding typical of a different condition than prenatal screening
questions.option_c: Incorrect mechanism or association for prenatal screening
questions.option_d: Correct statement consistent with prenatal screening
questions.explanation: The correct answer reflects standard undergraduate medical/dental knowledge for prenatal screening.
